'''âm-k-t-v''' ('''kamaktevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:womanish|womanish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-k-t-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:womanish|womanish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-k-t-v
|-
! Lemma
| kamaktevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimaktevoko|thimaktevoko]] || [[word:jimaktevoko|jimaktevoko]] || [[word:shimaktevoko|shimaktevoko]] || [[word:kimaktevoko|kimaktevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumaktevoko|thuthumaktevoko]] || [[word:jujumaktevoko|jujumaktevoko]] || [[word:shushumaktevoko|shushumaktevoko]] || [[word:kukumaktevoko|kukumaktevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumaktevoko|thumaktevoko]] || [[word:jumaktevoko|jumaktevoko]] || [[word:shumaktevoko|shumaktevoko]] || [[word:kumaktevoko|kumaktevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumaktevoko|thumaktevoko]] || [[word:jumaktevoko|jumaktevoko]] || [[word:shumaktevoko|shumaktevoko]] || [[word:kumaktevoko|kumaktevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themaktevoko|themaktevoko]] || [[word:jemaktevoko|jemaktevoko]] || [[word:shemaktevoko|shemaktevoko]] || [[word:kemaktevoko|kemaktevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomaktevoko|thothomaktevoko]] || [[word:jojomaktevoko|jojomaktevoko]] || [[word:shoshomaktevoko|shoshomaktevoko]] || [[word:kokomaktevoko|kokomaktevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomaktevoko|thomaktevoko]] || [[word:jomaktevoko|jomaktevoko]] || [[word:shomaktevoko|shomaktevoko]] || [[word:komaktevoko|komaktevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomaktevoko|thomaktevoko]] || [[word:jomaktevoko|jomaktevoko]] || [[word:shomaktevoko|shomaktevoko]] || [[word:komaktevoko|komaktevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠmaktevoko|thĂŠmaktevoko]] || [[word:jĂŠmaktevoko|jĂŠmaktevoko]] || [[word:shĂŠmaktevoko|shĂŠmaktevoko]] || [[word:kĂŠmaktevoko|kĂŠmaktevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamaktevoko|thathamaktevoko]] || [[word:jajamaktevoko|jajamaktevoko]] || [[word:shashamaktevoko|shashamaktevoko]] || [[word:kakamaktevoko|kakamaktevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamaktevoko|thamaktevoko]] || [[word:jamaktevoko|jamaktevoko]] || [[word:shamaktevoko|shamaktevoko]] || [[word:kamaktevoko|kamaktevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamaktevoko|thamaktevoko]] || [[word:jamaktevoko|jamaktevoko]] || [[word:shamaktevoko|shamaktevoko]] || [[word:kamaktevoko|kamaktevoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shamaktevithi|shamaktevithi]] || [[word:shamakteviji|shamakteviji]] || [[word:shamaktevishi|shamaktevishi]] || [[word:shamakteviki|shamakteviki]]
